expectations.text: Output includes all 5 stories from the fixture (us001, us002, us003, us013, us014)
expectations.evidence: All five ids appear under their status sections

expectations.text: Stories are grouped by status (Draft / Ready / Done at minimum)
expectations.evidence: Three H2 sections: ## Draft, ## Ready, ## Done

expectations.text: Each story shows a Connextra-style one-liner with role/want/because
expectations.evidence: Each story has 'As a ... I want ... because ...' line

expectations.text: Each story shows its acceptance criteria as bullets
expectations.evidence: Each story has its bullet list of criteria

expectations.text: Output ends with a total count summary
Persona aliases are rendered as readable labels ('requestor', 'approver'), not raw [[pn001|...]] wikilinks
expectations.evidence: 'requestor' and 'approver' rendered bare; no wikilink syntax in the output
